name: patch-moi
description: Git-first fork maintenance for patch stacks on top of upstream projects.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain Git patch stacks on upstream forks with safe local inspection and dry-runs.
interface.longDescription: patch.moi helps operators inspect upstream remotes, local patch branches, DATA_DIR state, and named workspace automation dispatch before maintenance work begins. Local mode is read-mostly by default, with fetch and mutation tools gated by explicit policy.
defaultPrompt: Dry-run the latest upstream release automation.
Triage a failed patch.moi maintenance attempt.
